since_last: 36% of 87 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +0.47%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 36% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.22% · BTC -2.78% · Gold +0.76% · Nasdaq100 +0.25%. 36% of 87 AI names are green — broad selling. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +0.47%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +0.47%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.25%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at +11.40%
cards.body: Leaders: MU +11.40%, AMAT +4.77%, QCOM +4.74%, ROK +4.44%, CGNX +3.80%. Laggards: DELL -7.55%, AI -7.40%, APP -4.90%, PLTR -4.69%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.99% at $153.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.99% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
